title: Batra Hospital & Medical Research Centre : Best multi-specialty private hospital in South Delhi
description: Batra Hospital is the first multi-specialty private hospital in South Delhi that offers tertiary level care in 42 specialties offering modern medical care for Cancer, Cardiac, Orthopaedics, Nephrology, and Neuro Surgery.

About Batra Hospital Patient centricity and best in class services is what drives Batra Hospital. Know us to know healthcare at its best. Batra Hospital & Medical Research Centre was established in 1987 by Ch. Aishi Ram Batra Public Charitable Trust with an infrastructure comprising 500 beds, 10 Operation Theatres, 80 ICU beds, 24x7 Emergency facilities, a full range of state-of-the-art diagnostic laboratories and comprehensive rehabilitation facilities. Batra Hospital is the capital’s first multi-speciality private hospital of Delhi. Our aim has always been to bring world-class medical care within reach of the common man. Over the years, it has progressed, bringing in the latest and the most modern medical care in critical and life-threatening areas like Cancer, Cardiac, Orthopaedics, Nephrology and Neuro Surgery. Know More Testimonial Award and recognizations When we deliver, the world recognizes. Batra Hospital has proudly presents to you the various awards over the years.
